job_description:
# Healthcare Data Analyst
Company: JPC Partners
Source: Dice
Employment type: Contract
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/d9a3b3eb-51b8-4459-a559-e7c6230a5486/

- Remote healthcare migration role.
- Focus on data profiling, mapping, transformation design, and quality validation.

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL | Data Migration Validation | Data Profiling
replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and profiling enterprise data across healthcare and regulated domains. Strong background in advanced SQL, source-to-target mapping, transformation validation, data quality checks, and collaboration with technical teams to ensure secure and accurate data movement.
replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.

replacements.replace: Validated 60+ ETL workflows across Informatica and Azure Data Factory feeding enterprise healthcare reporting and analytics platforms and supporting complex transformation and reconciliation requirements.
replacements.find: Validated 60+ ETL workflows across Informatica and Azure Data Factory feeding enterprise healthcare reporting and analytics platforms—covering claims, member eligibility, provider, and payer-operations data supporting multi-million-member BCBS populations.

replacements.replace: Authored 200+ advanced SQL queries for source-to-target reconciliation across 100M+ claim and member records, helping validate transformations and identify migration-related mismatches before release.
replacements.find: Authored 200+ advanced SQL queries (multi-table joins, window functions, CTEs) for source-to-target reconciliation across 100M+ claim and member records, reducing release-blocking defects by ~30% across major releases.

gaps: AWS migration is stronger than current hands-on resume
notes: Tailored toward profiling, mapping, transformation validation, and compliant healthcare data handling.
validation_notes: page contains expired/closed-job text: job is no longer available
